Collector Grade

Built For
The Display Case.

Inspired by the golden era of action figures — the early 2000s, when toys were epic, packaging was explosive, and every figure told a story. That energy, elevated to premium collector standards.

The Campaign

Three Channels.
One Takeover.

01
TikTok Toy Battles
Viral · Social · UGC

Short-form battle videos. Collectors recreate exaggerated action scenes with the figures. History class was boring — so we turned it into a toy.

#BattleTheVillains
02
Toy Store Takeover
Retail · OOH · Display

Dramatic shelf takeovers at major toy retailers. Full aisle domination — explosive retro packaging, battle artwork, and one unmissable line.

Make America Play Again.
03
ComicCon Activation
Experiential · Event · Social

Giant figures. Pose stations. Instant social upload. Attendees build their own battle, film it, and share it live — turning the launch into a viral spectacle.

BUILD YOUR OWN BATTLE.
